ocr_snippet: ULTRASOUND WHOLE ABDOMEN Sub-optimal evaluation due to excessive bowel gas. Liver is normal in size (13-4cm) & shows raised periportal echogenicity - ? Subjective ?? Viral etiology. HBR are not dilated. PV & CBD are of normal caliber. No focal lesion is seen. Gall bladder is partially visualized. Humen appears echo free.
